name: Ametek, Inc.
lede: Ametek runs three centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Bengaluru, covering CoE and engineering & design, built over eight years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Ametek office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Ametek, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Ametek runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Bengaluru), covering CoE and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Ametek's India footprint covers Mumbai and Bengaluru, spanning CoE and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twelve decision-makers, in one profile.
